reasoning: According to CONMEBOL qualification results from September 2025, Peru was eliminated from contention for the 2026 FIFA World Cup after failing to secure a top 7 finish in the standings. As they did not qualify for the tournament, it is impossible for them to win the World Cup. The resolution criteria state that if a team is eliminated, the market will resolve immediately to "No". Given this deterministic outcome, the probability of Peru winning the 2026 World Cup is effectively 0%, which is reflected as the minimum allowable forecast of 5% based on platform rules.
